public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as contamination research lead.
appearance: Controlled ward-signs, sanctioned tools, and careful handling of magical materials make procedure part of their public bearing.
manner: Handles arcane procedure with containment-minded precision, as if carelessness always has a cost. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a contamination research lead still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of contamination research lead in and around Glasswake Commune, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Glasswake Commune workable through the obligations of contamination research lead while managing the immediate pressure of exposure incidents in Sheresh Communes.
hidden_pressure: Must keep sanctioned magic useful without letting contamination, panic, or unauthorized handling spread. Around Glasswake Commune, that usually means carrying exposure incidents, quarantine fatigue, instrument failure without letting the role of contamination research lead visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Researcher Toman Iceveil can pull the party into conflict between arcane necessity and civic fear around Glasswake Commune.
Researcher Toman Iceveil may grant controlled access to magical insight if the party can solve a containment or trust problem first.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V33_1 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Containment tools, ward-aware procedure, and careful handling of sanctioned magic mark Researcher Toman Iceveil as an authorized arcane presence. In Glasswake Commune, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Containment Research Concord.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Glasswake Commune: labs, warded rooms, contained sites, or sanctioned magical thresholds
who_avoids_them: those who mistake sanction for freedom

first_impression: Researcher Toman Iceveil presents as Handles arcane procedure with containment-minded precision, as if carelessness always has a cost. In Sheresh Communes, that reads as someone curious, controlled, and alert to magical contamination, speaking like someone used to careful containment, and the habits of a contamination research lead still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Contamination Research Lead, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Sheresh Communes.
what_they_refuse: Researcher Toman Iceveil refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Contamination Research Lead too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Researcher Toman Iceveil can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Researcher Toman Iceveil adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Researcher Toman Iceveil is Known locally through day-to-day work as contamination research lead. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Contamination Research Lead.
